500.title: Voice of a Killer
500.description: When a criminal on probation embarks on a killing spree of ex-lovers, police try to get ahead of the man who will later insist that he is a victim and that society is to blame.

501.title: Judge Judy
501.description: The ride home from a KISS concert turns violent when a man allegedly attacks his friend in the car. She sues for the assault and for damage to her vehicle.

502.title: Cheaters
502.description: Brenda's husband claims to work long hours - but his co-workers say otherwise. Raquel finds a phone number on a napkin in her boyfriend's pocket.

503.title: World's Most Evil Killers
503.description: Examining the life and crimes of Stephen Seddon, who killed his parents for a legacy.

504.title: Judge Judy
504.description: A former roommate is accused of punching a hole in a door. Then, an alleged assault during a basketball game.

505.title: Judge Judy
505.description: A man says his professional organizer falsified her hours and stole jewellery. Then, a new mother sues the baby's father for unpaid utility bills and emotional distress.

506.title: Judge Judy
506.description: Neighbours sue a 12-year-old's parents for damages after he hits their SUV with his bicycle. Then, a teen admits to breaking a car's windshield but says it was not his fault because another teen dared him to do it.

507.title: Something's Killing Me
507.description: Seven Chicago residents died under mysterious medical circumstances. Diagnoses included cardiac arrest, stroke and aneurism. However, a connection is made to all seven victims.

508.title: Operation Repo
508.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

509.title: Operation Repo
509.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

510.title: Judge Judy
510.description: The owner of a vacation home sues for damage to the property and a cancelled payment. Then, a woman says her former friend sold and gave away her belongings, including her dog.

511.title: Judge Judy
511.description: A teen says her mother stole money owed to her from her father's death benefit. Then, a teen's boyfriend refuses to repay a loan from her trust fund.

512.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
512.description: Team Salvage must save a stranded vessel stuck in a mangrove forest in North Queensland. The only solution is to hoist it out.

513.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
513.description: Cecily makes good on a bond after she decides to take down the missing fugitive; Dog lets Cecily and Dakota lead a search.

514.title: Close Calls On Camera
514.description: A family is trapped 50 metres up on a major tourist attraction on the South Coast, and a young rock climber disobeys his dad, with terrifying consequences.

515.title: Operation Repo
515.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

517.title: Paranormal Survivor
517.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

518.title: Judge Judy
518.description: A woman says she did not finish paying for a car because it was a lemon.

519.title: Judge Judy
519.description: A woman enlists a police sergeant to help her retrieve a security deposit.

520.title: Judge Judy
520.description: A woman sues her child's father for the return of her winnings from a slot machine.

521.title: Operation Repo

522.description: Team Salvage must save a stranded vessel stuck in a mangrove forest in North Queensland. The only solution is to hoist it out.

523.title: Something's Killing Me
523.description: Jeanna Giese complains to her parents that she's fatigued and has numbness in her arm. Doctors speculate that it might be Lyme disease or West Nile, but what Jeanna has is far more sinister.

525.description: Cecily makes good on a bond after she decides to take down the missing fugitive; Dog lets Cecily and Dakota lead a search.

526.title: Judge Judy
526.description: A woman sues her former flatmate for medical bills and loss of tuition after an assault, and a woman sues her ex-boyfriend's former flatmate for missing property.

527.title: Judge Judy
527.description: An ex-husband sues for slander and property damage, and a woman wants her ex-fiance to pay her back.

537.title: World's Most Evil Killers
537.description: Investigating the life and crimes of Richard Chase, also known as the Vampire of Sacramento.

538.title: Cheaters
538.description: Chuck's wife complains of needing more space and moves out - but is there another reason for her exit? Ann finds evidence of her boyfriend's infidelity in his car.

539.title: Fame Kills
539.description: The case of an aspiring country singer on the verge of a recording contract who goes missing after traveling to Nashville to record a demo.

540.title: Paranormal Survivor
540.description: Crystal Martin and her sister were terrorised for years by ghosts.
